ddls:
CREATE TABLE "structures" (
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each structure */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the structure */,
  "meters" REAL /* Height of the structure in meters */,
  "feet" INTEGER /* Height of the structure in feet */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the structure was completed */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the structure (e.g., skyscraper, communications tower) */,
  "main_use" TEXT /* Primary use of the structure */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* City where the structure is located */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Country where the structure is located */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Notable remarks about the structure */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the structure's location */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the structure's location */,
  "architectural_style" TEXT /* Architectural style of the structure */,
  "construction_company" TEXT /* Company responsible for construction */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Total construction cost */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the structure was officially opened */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the structure */,
  "official_website" TEXT /* Official website of the structure */,
  "wiki_link" TEXT /* Wikipedia link for the structure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("structure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_structures_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_structures_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_structures_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES structure_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "structure_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each structure type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the structure type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the structure type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the structure type (e.g., building, tower) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Country where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the city was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., architect, engineer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the structure being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the structure */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the structure was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("structure_id") REFERENCES structures ("structure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notations" (
  "notation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notation */,
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the structure the notation belongs to */,
  "notation" TEXT /* Notation or remark about the structure */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the notation (e.g., record, award) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notations_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("structure_id") REFERENCES structures ("structure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the structure the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("structure_id") REFERENCES structures ("structure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media item */,
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the structure the media item belongs to */,
  "media_file" TEXT /* File path to the media item */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., image, video) */,
  "copyright" TEXT /* Copyright information for the media item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("structure_id") REFERENCES structures ("structure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the structure the award belongs to */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., engineering, architecture) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("structure_id") REFERENCES structures ("structure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "architects" (
  "architect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each architect */,
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the structure the architect is associated with */,
  "architect_name" TEXT /* Name of the architect */,
  "architect_role" TEXT /* Role of the architect (e.g., lead architect, designer) */,
  "firm" TEXT /* Architecture firm the architect belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("architect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_architects_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("structure_id") REFERENCES structures ("structure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "structure_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the structure the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_structure_features_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("structure_id") REFERENCES structures ("structure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the structure being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("structure_id") REFERENCES structures ("structure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
